wheelchair_routes.name: North Accessible Route
wheelchair_routes.description: Level pathway from Gate A through Main Concourse to North Stand lower sections. No stairs. Elevator access to Upper North at Concourse Point N1.

wheelchair_routes.name: East Accessible Route
wheelchair_routes.description: Ramped access from Gate C to East Stand. Gentle incline (1:20 gradient). Handrails on both sides.

wheelchair_routes.name: South Accessible Route
wheelchair_routes.description: Level entry from Gate E directly into South Stand concourse. Closest to accessible parking Lot K.

wheelchair_routes.name: West Accessible Route
wheelchair_routes.description: Level pathway from Gate G. Elevator bank at Concourse Point W1 for upper level access.

quiet_rooms.name: Sensory Room — North
quiet_rooms.location: Near Gate B, Main Concourse Level
quiet_rooms.description: Low-stimulation space for fans with sensory sensitivities. Dim lighting, noise-dampening walls, comfortable seating.

quiet_rooms.name: Sensory Room — South
quiet_rooms.description: Quiet space with live match feed on a small screen. Noise-canceling headphones available.

prayer_rooms.name: Multi-Faith Room — East
prayer_rooms.description: Multi-faith prayer and meditation room. Prayer mats and ablution facilities available. Open throughout match day.

prayer_rooms.name: Multi-Faith Room — West
prayer_rooms.description: Quiet prayer space with compass direction markers. Open throughout match day.

recycling_points.notes: Green bins for compostable food waste

recycling_points.type: Full sorting station (plastic, glass, paper, compost)
recycling_points.notes: Staffed recycling station with volunteers to help sort

sustainability_initiatives: All food containers are compostable or recyclable
Reusable cup program — deposit and return for $2 refund
Solar panels on stadium roof power 30% of match-day electricity
Carbon offset program — fans can contribute at info desks
Free filtered water refills to reduce single-use plastic

first_aid.location: Gate A — North First Aid Station
Gate E — South First Aid Station

restrooms.location: Upper Level — at each elevator bank
